title: Ornithoxanthum arvense

Ornithoxanthum arvense is native to South Africa, where it is commonly found in grasslands and savannas. The plant is characterized by its funnel-shaped flowers and strap-shaped leaves. Its classification is further supported by its distinct morphological and anatomical features.
